publishedAbstract: * `atomic-openshift-node` service fails to start and dumping cores * Error in `journalctl` logs: ~~~ Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: I1001 10:54:44.496715 1816 kubelet.go:265] Watching apiserver Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: I1001 10:54:44.502137 1816 kubelet.go:494] Hairpin mode set to "none" Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: W1001 10:54:44.504848 1816 cni.go:157] Unable to update cni config: No networks found in /etc/cni/net. Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: I1001 10:54:44.504890 1816 plugins.go:196] Loaded network plugin "cni" Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: W1001 10:54:44.506106 1816 cni.go:157] Unable to update cni config: No networks found in /etc/cni/net. Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: W1001 10:54:44.519296 1816 cni.go:157] Unable to update cni config: No networks found in /etc/cni/net. Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: I1001 10:54:44.519317 1816 plugins.go:196] Loaded network plugin "cni" Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: I1001 10:54:44.519359 1816 docker_service.go:186] Docker cri networking managed by cni Oct 01 10:54:44 node ovs-vsctl[1898]: ovs|00001|vsctl|INFO|Called as ovs-vsctl--if-exists del-br br0-- add-br br0-- set Bridge br0 fail-mode=secure prot Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: I1001 10:54:44.534463 1816 docker_service.go:203] Setting cgroupDriver to systemd Oct 01 10:54:44 node atomic-openshift-node[1816]: F1001 10:54:44.538887 1816 node.go:309] error: SDN node startup failed: signal: segmentation fault (co Oct 01 10:54:44 node systemd[1]: atomic-openshift-node.service: main process exited, code=exited, status=255/n/a Oct 01 10:54:44 node systemd[1]: Failed to start OpenShift Node. ~~~ * `openvswitch` is crashing with `segmentation fault` error
publishedTitle: atomic-openshift-node service fails to start and generating core files
